Whether you’re hitting the slopes, exploring the village or enjoying tobogganing at Windy Corner with Everest Sports, there’s plenty to experience this week.

We have a great lineup of events and activations, including Twilight Tuesdays, Thursday night fireworks, live music and après experiences throughout the resort.

Planning to go tobogganing? Book your Windy Corner session with Everest Sports here

Discover what’s happening across the village. Explore the What’s On page HERE

Hut","CrossCountryDescription":"Fair","CrossCountryGroomed":"Closed"}]},"CrossCountryMaintenance":{"CrossCountryReporterDate":"19 July 2026","CrossCountryComments":"Good morning, everyone! Some tricky conditions overnight saw us with some rock-solid snow. The Nordic Bowl, Horseyard Loop and Panorama Loop are all looking very nice. Pretty Valley Road from Aitkens to High Plains Road is getting a little patchy, but there is still at least a full snowcats width along the entire length. High Plains Road from the Dam Wall to the Aqueduct is holding up pretty well, with just 1 or 2 small sections where it is down to a single cat width but otherwise holding up great to the sun. Classic Skiers, some sections of the track haven't set as nicely as I would like, due to the hardness of the snow and the difficulty of getting it broken up enough to set. Everything that can be done on the inner trails has been done and should get at least a couple hours to set up before the sun rises. Have a great day and don't forget your sunscreen! ","CrossCountryConditions":"Spring","CrossCountryCover":"Fair","CrossCountryLastGroomed":"20 July 2026","CrossCountryTotalGroomed":"9","CrossCountryTotalGroomed24":"2"},"SlopeMaintenance":{"Comments":"","CubicMetersofSnow":"","CurrentStatus":"On","GroomerChoice":"-","LastUpdateDate":"05 July 2026","LastUpdateTime":"11:44 AM","AverageSnowMaking":"0"},"Parks":{"Park":[{"ParkName":"Castle Park","ParkDetail":"Ruined Castle","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Drover's Dream Park","ParkDetail":"Top of Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Panorama Park","ParkDetail":"Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"}]},"Patrol":{"PatrolDate":"20 July 2026","PatrolTime":"6:06 AM","PatrolNaturalSnowDepth":"38","PatrolFreshSnow":"0","PatrolVillageBowl":"39","PatrolSunValley":"45","PatrolNorthSide":"30","PatrolLastSnowFall":"14 July 2026","SeasonalSnowfallToDate":"","PatrolSnowCover":"Clear skies and beautiful weather ahead today. Temps overnight hit a low of 5.3 degrees, but humidity stayed in the low 20's to teens all night, allowing snowmakers to have the guns blazing continuously, and allowing us to get a freeze. Off-piste terrain is very hard pack at the moment so ski and ride with caution. The pick of the morning will be our fresh groomers with beautiful new snowmaking on them. We're headed for a top of 7 degrees today so layer appropriately. Have fun and be safe out there!","PatrolForecast":"Areas of frost and patchy fog this morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 16.","PatrolSnowChains":"Must be carried","PatrolRoadConditions":"Road Open: Beware icy patches","PatrolVillageRoadConditions":"Partial ski in ski out.
